headline: CME Plans Computing Power Futures Market
summary: US derivatives exchange CME Group and index provider Silicon Data are teaming up to create a futures market for computing power. Bloomberg's Katherine Doherty discusses the reasons for the new market and how it will work. She joins Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech."

headline: CME Group and Silicon Data Partner to Launch First Compute Futures
summary: CME Group, the world's leading derivatives marketplace, and Silicon Data, the industry leader in GPU market intelligence and benchmarking backed by global trading firm DRW, today announced they will launch a first-in-class compute futures market later this year, pending regulatory review.

headline: CME Is Launching a Bitcoin VIX: Here’s Why That Changes Wall Street’s Bitcoin Game
summary: For years, Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) traders have focused on one main question: where is BTC headed next? But on Wall Street, another question matters just as much: how violently will BTC move along the way? That is the market CME Group is targeting. On May 5, CME Group announced plans to expand its digital asset ... CME Is Launching a Bitcoin VIX: Here’s Why That Changes Wall Street’s Bitcoin Game
